title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
